str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - learning-process
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Not Being Able to Solve Coding Problems
entry.summary: In today's fast-paced tech industry, coding is an essential skill for many professionals. However, even experienced developers can encounter coding problems that seem insurmountable. The fear of not being able to solve these issues can hinder progress and stunt personal and professional growth. In this blog post, we explore ten practical strategies to help developers overcome the fear of not being able to solve coding problems. From accepting normalcy in facing such challenges to seeking feedback from other developers, practicing self-care, learning new skills, and embracing failure as an opportunity for learning, this post provides a comprehensive guide to help coders approach these difficulties with greater clarity, focus, and determination. By adopting these strategies, developers can continue growing as a collective community and learn from the experiences of others. Join us in our quest to overcome coding problems and thrive in the tech world!

entry.title: How to Deal with the Fear of Coding Mistakes
entry.summary: In today's digital age, coding has become an integral part of various industries, with developers playing a crucial role in creating innovative solutions. However, one of the most common fears that plagues developers is the fear of making mistakes while coding. This fear can be debilitating, leading to procrastination, anxiety, or even abandoning a project altogether. But what if we told you that it's possible to overcome this fear? In this blog post, we'll share 10 actionable tips on how to deal with the fear of coding mistakes. From accepting mistakes as part of the learning process and embracing a growth mindset to seeking feedback, practicing consistently, and staying calm and persistent, our tips aim to help developers approach coding with more confidence and less fear. By implementing these techniques, you can improve your skills, prevent errors, and become a more confident and skilled developer. So, whether you're a seasoned coder or just starting your journey, let's learn together how to overcome the fear of coding mistakes. Happy reading!

entry.title: How to Learn to Code by Participating in Pair Programming
entry.summary: In our fast-paced digital world, coding skills have become increasingly crucial in almost every industry. However, learning how to code can be a daunting task for many individuals. That's where pair programming comes into play. In this blog post, we explore 10 points on how to learn to code by participating in pair programming.
